economic_notes: First Nation operates solar LPs (NFN Solar LP, Nipissing Solar SPN LP), forestry (N'Bisiing Forestry Inc.), community developments LP (Nipissing Community Developments LP), and Bineshii Projects LP. Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust holds ~$96.5M in restricted investments (bonds and marketable securities). Partnership with Miller Paving Limited (Nipissing-Miller LP). COVID-19 impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust consolidated on a December 31, 2020 period end and included in consolidated statements; trust holds ~$96.5M restricted assets not available for normal operations. Trust investment income of $4,651,673 and unrealized gain of $2,709,392 significantly impact the annual surplus. This is the first year of adoption of PSAB Section 3450 Financial Instruments, resulting in retrospective recognition of unrealized gains. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. ISC funding per funding confirmation was $12,386,599 vs $7,462,702 recognized as revenue (difference due to deferred revenue). Total government transfers estimated as: ISC $7,462,702 + MCSS $1,758,787 + Ministry of Education $717,985 + Other Provincial $2,213,544 + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body $5,998,019 + Union of Ontario Indians $1,639,660 + CMHC $366,899 + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership $1,414,976 = $21,572,572 (OFNLP included as it is a government-sourced transfer body); osr adjusted accordingly. Budget information not presented.
